retrieved_result: Fitbit adds support for 12 new Android phones from Motorola, HTC, LG, and Google Fitbit adds support for 12 new Android phones from Motorola, HTC, LG, and Google Newsby Shawn Ingram January 7, 2014 174At CES Fitbit announced that its fitness trackers now support 12 additional Android smartphones from a variety of manufacturers in addition to the Samsung devices already supported
Decision_Reason: The retrieved page discusses Fitbit hardware compatibility with Android devices, unrelated to software development IDEs.
